database-object.create: CREATE TABLE [dbo].[Warnings]( [Id] [int] NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY NONCLUSTERED, [Name] [nvarchar](255) NOT NULL, [StateAId] [int] NOT NULL, [StateBId] [int] NOT NULL, [TaskId] [nvarchar](255) NOT NULL, [ErrorCode] [int] NOT NULL, [AlarmName] [nvarchar](255) NULL, [StartTime] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL, [EndTime] [datetime2](7) NULL, [TotalMilliseconds] [int] NULL, [CreatedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL, [UpdatedAt] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL, [BatchDate] [datetime2](7) NOT NULL, [SourceType] [nvarchar](255) NULL, [DeviceType] [nvarchar](255) NULL, [Level] [int] NOT NULL, [Version] [int] NOT NULL ) ON [PRIMARY]
database-object.drop: IF EXISTS (SELECT * FROM sys.objects WHERE object_id = OBJECT_ID(N'[dbo].[Warnings]') AND type in (N'U')) DROP TABLE [dbo].[Warnings]

database-object.create: CREATE CLUSTERED INDEX [IX_Warnings_StartTime] ON dbo.[Warnings] ( StartTime ) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
CREATE INDEX [IX_Warnings_EndTime] ON dbo.[Warnings] ( EndTime ) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
CREATE INDEX [IX_Warnings_Name] ON dbo.[Warnings] ( Name ) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
CREATE INDEX [IX_Warnings_SourceType] ON dbo.[Warnings] ( SourceType ) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
CREATE INDEX [IX_Warnings_DeviceType] ON dbo.[Warnings] ( DeviceType ) WITH( STATISTICS_NORECOMPUTE = OFF, IGNORE_DUP_KEY = OFF, ALLOW_ROW_LOCKS = ON, ALLOW_PAGE_LOCKS = ON) ON [PRIMARY]
